title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got your back, iron bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm good. Go and help the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha... I'm glad they won't be getting between us, but don't make me laugh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, I've got to handle this situation on my own now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!!!? How the hell are you spinning like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: - We'll

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't know Dino- Saurus could do that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is bad!! Run, Iron bro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Morons... If you have time to worry,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then you should worry about yourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Tricera- Copper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AYA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GUYS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You move real weird!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't think this would turn into an aerial battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The triceratops is a pretty special breed of dinosaur!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Go figure ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those damn problems are boosting your speed a helluva lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You tryin' to rush me down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do your worst !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: General Shield!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT...?! he spun his problem in the wrong way...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 28 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
